## Summary

Describe the change and its user or engineering impact.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran local checks
- [ ] I added or updated tests when needed
- [ ] I considered security and operational impact
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior or architecture changed
- [ ] I verified accessibility or explained why it is unchanged

## Risk

Describe rollout concerns, sensitive paths, or why risk is low.

## Review Notes

Point reviewers to the most important files, architectural decisions, or visual areas.
